name: Monastery of the Holy Spirit
description: The Monastery of the Holy Spirit is a Trappist monastery in Conyers, Georgia. Founded in 1944, it is one of the few Trappist monasteries in the American South. The monks follow the Rule of St. Benedict and offer retreats in contemplative prayer and silence. The monastery is known for its bonsai garden, stained glass windows, and the products made by the monks.
